code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line()
  let s = match line
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let p = parts.get(i)
    match p
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        if n > 0
          nums = list.push(nums, n)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  match list.max(nums)
  when Some(m)
    println("max=#{m}")
  when None
    println("none")
  end
  Ok(())
end
